findings.title: No sign-in activity in 104 days
findings.description: User account has not signed in since 2026-03-16. Account is enabled and retains all assigned licenses and group memberships.
findings.remediation: Confirm with the user's manager whether the account is still needed. Disable if no longer required, or document the reason for continued inactivity.

findings.title: No sign-in activity in 88 days
findings.description: User account has not signed in since 2026-04-01. Account is enabled and holds membership in 2 security groups.
findings.remediation: Confirm with the user's manager whether the account is still needed. Disable if no longer required, or document the reason for continued inactivity.

findings.title: No sign-in activity in 142 days
findings.description: Account naming suggests automated/service use, but is provisioned as a standard user account rather than a service principal. No sign-in since 2026-02-06.
findings.remediation: Determine the original purpose of this account. If it is functioning as a service identity, migrate it to an app registration/service principal. Otherwise disable.

findings.title: No sign-in activity in 61 days
findings.description: User account has not signed in since 2026-04-28. Just past the 60-day organizational threshold.
findings.remediation: Confirm with the user's manager whether the account is still needed. Disable if no longer required, or document the reason for continued inactivity.

findings.title: MFA not registered
findings.description: User has no multi-factor authentication method registered. Authentication relies on password only.
findings.remediation: Enforce MFA registration via Conditional Access or per-user MFA. Notify the user and require enrollment before next sign-in.

findings.title: MFA not registered
findings.description: User has no multi-factor authentication method registered. Authentication relies on password only.
findings.remediation: Enforce MFA registration via Conditional Access or per-user MFA. Notify the user and require enrollment before next sign-in.

findings.title: MFA not registered
findings.description: User has no multi-factor authentication method registered. Account also holds membership in a privileged-access group.
findings.remediation: Treat as high priority given group membership. Enforce MFA registration immediately and review associated access.

findings.title: Guest account inactive 75 days, retains access to 3 groups
findings.description: External guest account has not signed in since 2026-04-14 but remains a member of 3 groups, including a shared document library.
findings.remediation: Confirm the collaboration is still active with the sponsoring internal owner. Remove guest access if the engagement has ended.

findings.title: Guest account inactive 120 days, retains access to 1 group
findings.description: External guest account has not signed in since 2026-02-28. Sponsoring owner could not be determined from available metadata.
findings.remediation: Identify the sponsoring owner. If none can be found, remove the guest account as part of routine cleanup.

findings.title: Guest account never signed in since invite, 30 days ago
findings.description: Guest invitation accepted on 2026-05-29 but no sign-in has occurred since.
findings.remediation: Confirm whether the collaboration is still expected to proceed. Remove if the invitation is no longer needed.

findings.title: Permanent Global Administrator assignment (not via PIM)
findings.description: User holds a standing, permanent assignment to the Global Administrator role. No eligible/just-in-time activation is configured.
findings.remediation: Convert to a Privileged Identity Management (PIM) eligible assignment requiring justification and time-bound activation. Reserve permanent assignments for break-glass accounts only.

findings.title: Permanent Privileged Role Administrator assignment (not via PIM)
findings.description: User holds a standing, permanent assignment to the Privileged Role Administrator role, which can grant role assignments to any other user.
findings.remediation: Convert to a PIM-eligible assignment. Review whether this user requires the role at all given its scope to grant further privileged access.

findings.title: No sign-in activity in 210 days; client secret expires in 14 days
findings.description: Service principal has not authenticated in 210 days. Its client secret is set to expire 2026-07-12.
findings.remediation: Confirm whether the application is still in use. If not, remove the registration. If it is, rotate the expiring secret and investigate the lack of recent activity.

findings.title: No sign-in activity in 365+ days; credential never rotated
findings.description: Service principal has shown no authentication activity in over a year. The application credential has never been rotated since creation.
findings.remediation: Remove this app registration if it is confirmed unused. If retained for any reason, rotate credentials immediately and document the business justification.

findings.title: Holds Directory.ReadWrite.All; last used 95 days ago
findings.description: Service principal is granted the broad Directory.ReadWrite.All application permission but has not authenticated in 95 days.
findings.remediation: Review whether the granted permission scope matches actual usage. Reduce to a narrower read-only scope if possible, or remove the registration if no longer needed.

findings.title: Group excluded from all enabled Conditional Access policies
findings.description: The 'Contractors' group is listed as an exclusion on every enabled Conditional Access policy, including the baseline MFA-enforcement policy.
findings.remediation: Review the exclusion's original justification. Remove the exclusion or apply a scoped policy covering this group rather than leaving it fully uncovered.

findings.title: Policy is in Report-only mode 45 days past pilot window
findings.description: The 'Require MFA for All Users' Conditional Access policy has remained in Report-only mode since 2026-05-14, well past its intended 2-week pilot window, providing no actual enforcement.
findings.remediation: Review sign-in logs captured during the report-only period for unexpected impact, then switch the policy to 'On' to begin enforcement.
